name: daxter
description: Query, inspect, refresh, and audit Power BI semantic models over XMLA + REST, plus T-SQL on Fabric Warehouse / Lakehouse SQL endpoints — from one Docker image.
long_description: DAXter is a Docker-only Power BI Service client. This extension launches the DAXter MCP server in its container, so the cross-platform .NET XMLA/ADOMD engine runs the same on macOS, Windows, and Linux. Sign in once with the `daxter_login` tool (device-code) or the web console; the token persists in the `daxter-tokens` volume. Reads and audits are always available; refresh/cache writes are gated behind an explicit opt-in. No env file and no credentials are stored in this extension — authentication is interactive sign-in.

args: exec docker run -i --rm --name daxter-mcp-$(date +%s)-$$ -v daxter-tokens:/home/daxter/.daxter ghcr.io/danlugo/daxter:latest mcp
exec /usr/local/bin/docker run -i --rm --name daxter-mcp-$(date +%s)-$$ -v daxter-tokens:/home/daxter/.daxter ghcr.io/danlugo/daxter:latest mcp
docker run -i --rm --name daxter-mcp-%RANDOM%%RANDOM% -v daxter-tokens:/home/daxter/.daxter ghcr.io/danlugo/daxter:latest mcp
